faqs.question: How can I get into Saraswati Institute of Pharmacy for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Saraswati Institute of Pharmacy has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
B.Pharma Candidate must have studied Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects along with one of the Mathematics/Biology subjects with above mentioned marks in the above subjects taken together from any recognised Board/Council. The mentioned marks of SC/ST and OBC is for the candidate belonging to maharashtra State. Candidates who are appearing at the qualifying examination are also eligible. Maharashtra State candidates must have to appear for MHTCET. All India Candidates need to appear for MHTCET/NEET. However, preference shall be given to the candidate obtaining non zero positive score in NEET over the candidates who obtained non zero score in MHTCET.
D.Pharma Candidate passed 10+2 (science stream) with Physics, Chemistry and Biology or Mathematics or Any other qualification approved by the Pharmacy Council of India from any recognised institute/board are eligible to apply

faqs.answer: A:    Admission to all the Zakir Husain Delhi College courses is entrance-based. While Zakir Husain Delhi College accepts CUET UG exam for admission to its undergraduate courses, admission to all the PG programmes will be subject to the CUET- PG exam starting admission 2023. The institute along with DU started accepting CUET UG starting 2022 and the CUET PG from 2023 session onward. Before this, admission to UG was based on merit in Class 12 and PG admission was mostly subject to DUET exam previously conducted by DU. faqs.answer: In 2022, Zakir Husain Delhi College (like all DU affiliated colleges) adopted CUET UG exam for admission to its undergraduate courses. Zakir Husain Delhi College admission 2023 for UG courses (as per DU) will be through Common Seat Allocation System of the University of Delhi. But, at first, it is necessary that aspirants opt for DU during CUET form filling and later apply on the CSAS portal to be eligible for admission. The admission process after CUET result declaration is explained below:Step 1: After the declaration of the CUET UG exam, register on the DU CSAS portal in multiple phases.Step 2: Submit Zakir Husain Delhi College + Course combination preferences in the order of priority on the CSAS dashboard. Here student must select their preferred course and college as the option. Step 3: The University has released the dates for three DU CSAS Seat Allocation Lists which will be out on August 1, August 10 and August 22, 2023, respectively for all categories. Step 4: Once the candidate "Accept" the provisionally allocated seat, the Zakir Husain Delhi College will verify the eligibility and documents uploaded by the candidate online. The college has an option to 'Accept' or 'Reject' the admission of the student basis the verification. Step 5: Once Zakir Husain Delhi College accords the approval, candidates will have to pay the 'Admission Fee' to confirm their seat.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in Economics - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It’s a college cum trauma center.

content.Placements: Out of 42 student 13 students were placed at MNCs. The highest package was 7 LPA, and the lowest was 3.4 LPA. The average was 5.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Amazon, Flipkart, Blinkit, Zomato, Bigbasket, and many more. Some fintech companies also hired many students on internship.
content.Infrastructure: We had Wi-Fi to use for studies. The library was quite good classrooms were small but manageable. The food at my hostel was more than good. The menu changes daily, and it was healthy as compared to other places. There was a medical room in our college in case of an emergency.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: An amazing college because of good faculty members and crowd.

content.Placements: 60–80 percent of students are placed in my course, with the highest package 19.25 LPA, the lowest 13.20 LPA, and average 4–8 LPA, while top recruiters include Wipro, Genpact, TCS, Deloitte, EY, etc., and 40–70 percent of students get placed in these companies in roles like accounting, finance, banking, and business management.
content.Infrastructure: A new building is there with all the facilities, one of the biggest campuses, a good AC library, Wi-Fi available, a lab (under construction), and much more, with one of the best commerce faculties, but there is no hostel facility in our college.

paragraphs: Zakir Husain Delhi College has not released the placement report or brochure for 2024. However, the NIRF report 2024 has been released, which includes the 2023 placement statistics. As per the report, 294 UG (3-year) and 8 PG (2-year) students were placed during the 2023 placements. The median package offered to UG (3-year) and PG (2-year) students during Zakir Husain Delhi College placements 2023 were INR 80,000 and INR 6.09 LPA , respectively. The list of recruiters that participated in recent years' placements included ICICI Bank, Bajaj Finserv, Genpact , and many others.

hostel_campus.college_name: Zakir Husain Delhi College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

library.description: Zakir Hussain Delhi College library is one of the oldest libraries in Delhi University system, which came into existence way back in 1792 with the foundation of the College.Library is fully air conditioned with a total collection of around 1,10,000 documents.It has two reading halls with seating capacity of 100 each and a well-equipped multimedia lab having 78 computers connected to Delhi University through WAN. Library also houses a Book Bank with a rich collection of around 12000 books.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Volleyball Court, Table Tennis

Library also houses a Book Bank with a rich collection of around 12000 books.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Volleyball Court, Table Tennis

reviews.review_heading: It’s a college cum trauma center.
reviews.review_text: We had Wi-Fi to use for studies. The library was quite good classrooms were small but manageable. The food at my hostel was more than good. The menu changes daily, and it was healthy as compared to other places. There was a medical room in our college in case of an emergency.

reviews.review_heading: An amazing college because of good faculty members and crowd.
reviews.review_text: A new building is there with all the facilities, one of the biggest campuses, a good AC library, Wi-Fi available, a lab (under construction), and much more, with one of the best commerce faculties, but there is no hostel facility in our college.

reviews.review_heading: The top college in the University of Delhi.
reviews.review_text: Better infrastructure, rooms and library. Wi-Fi full network 5G. I'm so happy.

reviews.review_heading: Good crowd, helpful teachers, and decent placements but infrastructure needs improvement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Zakir Husain College is improving slowly, with basic but spacious classrooms, functioning projectors in the commerce block, a very good library, Wi-Fi with inconsistent speed, no hostel so students stay in PGs or rented rooms, decent and affordable canteen food, fine sports facilities, and medical help available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good but the infrastructure needs an upgrade.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is there. There are around 4 labs. We have a little mess classrooms, and an excellent library. There is no hostel provided. Medical room is fully functional. Ground is provided for different sports. College has different sports teams also.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best college in DU off.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is really good. Nice classrooms and banking facilities are also available inside the college. Big library, big ground, canteen, and eco-friendly atmosphere, and vast places to relax are the main highlights of the college.

reviews.review_heading: Poor placements and bad infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Water supply is too bad. If there is rain for 1 hour, you can even get to the college, nor you can go out. There is no hostel at this college. Canteen food is too bad that teachers told us not to eat from there. There is no Wi-Fi supply. The infrastructure is worst.

reviews.review_heading: Good for graduation only.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for B.Com (Prog) is not very good, but it is acceptable. Zakir Husain Delhi College does not provide hostels for students; instead, students reside in PG accommodations in Laxmi Nagar. Most of the students live in Laxmi Nagar, which is famous for CA and CS coaching.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Zakir Husain Delhi College.
reviews.review_text: All kinds of facilities and infrastructure are available in my department and course. Wi-Fi is available for free, classrooms are quite big and fully furnished, and the library has lots of helpful books. Hostel food is also very nice, and medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was fine in my time. But now I think the new building has started so it would be much better now. The new building was under construction in 2022 so it's a guess whether it has started now or not but I can say the new building was good.

reviews.review_heading: This college is recommended by me.
reviews.review_text: In the college, we get many facilities available, but it is not as good as expected. Still, it's kind of okay; the very much-needed facility is clean and has drinkable water, and here our college lacks that. However, now that a new union has been appointed, they do good work for students. We have great library facilities and comfortable seats for students.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with the infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There are different conditions in different classrooms. Few of them contain new benches whereas a few of them do not even have painted walls and old wooden benches which are not comfortable. The new building of the college is open just for lab purposes. I have no idea about the opening of the new building of Zakir Hussain Delhi College.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied, but strong literary, cultural activities and infrastructure need work!
reviews.review_text: Zakir Husain Delhi College has built a new building, but it is still not in use. English Honours classes are held in the old building, which has poor whiteboards, broken desks, and sometimes non-working fans. In summer, classrooms become very hot. Once, a ceiling fan even fell down. The library is useful, and Wi-Fi is available, but not very reliable. The sports ground is mostly unused, and hostel facilities are limited. The canteen is average. Overall, the infrastructure needs a lot of improvem...

reviews.review_heading: This college is an example of the dark side of Delhi University.
reviews.review_text: There is a new building under construction which might take another 10 years to complete. Moreover, there is no hostel facility. Don't expect too much from the canteen. There is only one playground where people play only cricket. The library has numerous important books but there will be a lot of noise.

reviews.review_heading: I wouldn't say I am satisfied but it is workable with what we've been given and we can manage.
reviews.review_text: There are no proper medical facilities. The college ground is open to all and it is quite decent. The canteen has recently been upgraded so the food and the quality is a bit increased. However, staff members are still negligent towards their duty and sack off on it. The library although has a proper supply and stock of books. Wi-Fi service is pretty bad.

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA in Aviation, Hospitality, Travel and Tourism Management - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: I absolutely loved it. I am satisfied with the infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: From my seniors' passing out batch for BBA Aviation, the placement season is good with approximately 80 percent of students securing offers before graduation. I am yet to know more about it. Overall, it is good with good packages, which I heard from my seniors who recently got placements. Students are even getting the opportunity to go abroad for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite good, with every necessity provided for the students to use. It has secure Wi-Fi connections. There is a big library with books on so many courses. Hostels of Parul University are good and cozy for living. Free medical support is provided to students of this university in the Parul Hospital. The mess food is of all different kinds and varieties. The food tastes good. We have huge playgrounds and an arena for indoor sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Placement is not so good, but the infrastructure is good, and also the exposure it gives.

review_content.Placements: 50-60 percent of students got placed. The highest package is 23 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. Recruiting companies areCognizant and Infosys for B.Tech and MBA. Many who got placed are the ones who were already placed somewhere or did an interview and had enough skills, so if you want to get an internship or a job, be ready to at least learn skills, as the company here selects a few.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good Wi-Fi and classrooms. The library is available. The quality of the medicine is available with free checkups. Wi-Fi is available everywhere in the hostel, library, or even food courts. The labs are also new, so nothing is needed. Canteen food is average, and they do provide fest and all.

faqs.answer: Parul University offers various prorgammes at the UG, PG, and other levels. The courses are available in the streams of Engineering, Management, Design, etc. Admission to Parul University courses is merit and entrance-based. As per the data curated from multiple sources, the top five courses of the university (in no particular order) are:Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA)Bachelor of Science (BSc)Master of Business Administration (MBA)Bachelor of Technology (BTech)Bachelor of Pharmacy (BPharm)
faqs.question: Q: Which is the best course offered in Parul University?

faqs.answer: Parul University offers a four-year BTech course in the stream of Engineering. This course is taught by the Faculty of Engineering & Technology more than 15 specialisations. Parul University also offers four Industry Embedded BTech courses, namely CSE/ IT with Microsoft, CSE/ IT with Quick Heal, CSE/ IT with SAP and CSE/ IT with Oracle. Find below all the BTech specialisations offered at Parul University. Find below the most popular BTech specialisations offered at Parul University:BTech SpecialisationAeronautical EngineeringAgricultural EngineeringAutomation and RoboticsAutomobile EngineeringBiomedical EngineeringBiotechnologyChemical EngineeringCivil EngineeringComputer Engineering
faqs.question: Q: Which BTech specialisation does Parul University offer?

faqs.answer: Parul University Online, Vadodara offers only one course in the stream of Management, i.e., MBA Online. This is a two-year-long online course. Students can pursue MBA Online in 20 Industry-centric specialisations. The institute has a collaboration with international universities located in France, UK and Japan. Students will study one year of this course in online mode at Parul University and a final year at an International University.
faqs.question: Q: What course does Parul University Online offer?

faqs.answer: Yes, Parul University offers an integrated BBA + MBA course in the stream of Management for a duration of four years. There is also an option to study a Diploma in Business Administration + Bachelor of Business Administration (DBA + BBA) course for a duration of five years. All of these courses are taught by the Faculty of Management Studies. In these courses, students get a combined UG & PG degree of BBA + MBA and Diploma + UG degree upon completion of the course. Candidates are required to pass Class 12 with English as the main subject from a recongised board for admission to the integrated course.

course_faqs.answer: Parul University offers BPharma for 4 years. Admission to this course is based on merit and entrance. Candidates must score a minimum of 50% aggregate in Class 12 and pass institution-level exams. The fee for BPharm may vary from INR 3.3 Lacs to INR 4.4 Lakh.

course_faqs.question: Is B.Pharm (lateral entry) course available at Parul University?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, Parul University offers a BPharm (lateral entry) course. It is a three-year course divided into six semesters. Candidates selected for admission are directly admitted to the second year of the course. Admission to the programme shall be granted on a merit basis. The eligible students can visit the university website to register and apply.

course_faqs.question: Which category has to pay more fees for BPharm courses at Parul University?
course_faqs.answer: The BPharm fees at Parul University is higher for the candidates who belong to the NRI category. Students of the NRI category have to pay INR 7.8 Lacs as BPharm fees. On the other hand, candidates who belong to the Management Quota are required to pay INR 5.4 Lacs for the BPharm course at Parul University. This difference in BPharm fees only applies to the first year admissions a Parul University. The BPharm fees for the lateral entry students is the same across all categories.

course_faqs.question: What is the BPharm fees for lateral entry students at Parul University?
course_faqs.answer: The Parul University BPharm fees for lateral entry student is the same for both Management Quota and NRI students. For NRI students, the BPharm lateral entry fees is INR 5.4 lakh. The fees is charged on per annum basis in three equal instalments. The fees is a combination of the tuition fees and university fees for Parul University BPharm lateral entry course.

overview_faqs.question: Is Parul University good for BHMS?
overview_faqs.answer: Parul University offers 5.5 years BHMS or Bachelor of Homoepathic Medicine and Surgery programme at the UG level. Students pursuing BHMS are open to ample placement opportunities. Parul University also provides placements to students. The overall the highest package offered to students is INR 60 LPA and average is INR 4-INR 6 LPA.

overview_faqs.question: Is Parul University in Vadodara, Gujarat good for BBA?
overview_faqs.answer: Parul University offers a good number of diversity in specialisations. Candidates can pursue a BBA course across 23 specialisations at Parul University. Those who get a degree of BBA from Parul University can build careers in Consultancy, Digital Marketing, Finance, Advertising, Banking, etc. The overall placement rate is also good at the university as per the statistics witnessed during the placement drive of the year 2022, where the highest package was INR 30 LPA and INR 7 LPA. Further, the department is equipped with advanced laboratories and classrooms that provide vital practical training exposure to students.

overview_faqs.question: Is studying at Parul University Goa free?
overview_faqs.answer: No, studying at Parul University, Goa is not free. Candidates must pay the course fee which ranges between INR 40K to INR 1.20 Lacs. The total fee can include multiple components, such as tuition fees, security deposit, hostel fees, mess fees, and more. However, the university offers several scholarships with fee waivers. Eligible candidates can avail the benefits of the scholarship programs.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for Parul University BTech course?
overview_faqs.answer: Those who get selected via the admission process for BTech must proceed further to pay Parul University fee for BTech. The total fee for a four-year BTech course ranges between INR 5.15 Lacs – INR 8.07 lakh, which is inclusive of the Parul University BTech fee for all specialisations, BTech (Lateral Entry) and BTech (Industry Embedded) courses. Apart from this, candidates also have to pay an application fee of INR 300 at the time of filling the application form. For more course-specific fee details, students can visit the official website of Parul University.

review_summary.college_name: Parul University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The best university India has to offer, both national and international.

content.Placements: Hence, I’m still a student, so I’m not eligible for the placement cell till now, but the students get posted to many companies, clinics, or hospitals with great opportunities and salary. What I know is that they are providing the best hospital exposure in the university itself.
content.Infrastructure: Good LED TV for PPT, projector, library, easy study material access, and many more things, with great university infrastructure and the best teaching staff. The most important thing is that we are allowed to learn many more things despite the course we have taken.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Aeronautical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Knowledgeable faculty and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: There's a placement policy in my college which gives us training for free, and the top recruiting companies of my course are Indigo and Hitech Digital Solutions. Though there is a penalty if we don't follow the placement policy, it's fair enough to have it.
content.Infrastructure: I'm a day scholar, and the bus facilities are amazing. My friends live in a hostel, and I've heard about some hostel facilities that are good enough. The campus is very interesting and fun to be in. The bus timings align perfectly with our timetable.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Aviation, Hospitality, Travel and Tourism Management - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I absolutely loved it. I am satisfied with the infrastructure.

content.Placements: From my seniors' passing out batch for BBA Aviation, the placement season is good with approximately 80 percent of students securing offers before graduation. I am yet to know more about it. Overall, it is good with good packages, which I heard from my seniors who recently got placements. Students are even getting the opportunity to go abroad for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite good, with every necessity provided for the students to use. It has secure Wi-Fi connections. There is a big library with books on so many courses. Hostels of Parul University are good and cozy for living. Free medical support is provided to students of this university in the Parul Hospital. The mess food is of all different kinds and varieties. The food tastes good. We have huge playgrounds and an arena for indoor sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Placement is not so good, but the infrastructure is good, and also the exposure it gives.

content.Placements: 50-60 percent of students got placed. The highest package is 23 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. Recruiting companies areCognizant and Infosys for B.Tech and MBA. Many who got placed are the ones who were already placed somewhere or did an interview and had enough skills, so if you want to get an internship or a job, be ready to at least learn skills, as the company here selects a few.
content.Infrastructure: Good Wi-Fi and classrooms. The library is available. The quality of the medicine is available with free checkups. Wi-Fi is available everywhere in the hostel, library, or even food courts. The labs are also new, so nothing is needed. Canteen food is average, and they do provide fest and all.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Average college, not the best.

content.Placements: Good placement, 85% B.Tech CSE batch placed. The highest package is 27 LPA, the lowest: 2.5 LPA, average is 5.7 LPA. Top recruiters are TCS, Accenture, Wipro, Infosys, IBM, Amazon. Roles offered are Software Developer, Data Analyst, Cloud Engineer, Software Engineer, Full Stack Developer.
content.Infrastructure: CSE dept: Modern labs with high-speed Wi-Fi, projector classrooms, CSE library, AI/ML labs. Hostels are clean. The hostel has AC/Non-AC rooms, 24/7 Wi-Fi, gym, sports grounds, hospital, average mess food (Guj/North Indian), canteens, ATMs. Room conditions depend on what you pay.

paragraphs: Parul University offers admission to all the UG and PG based on merit or entrance-exam scores. Aspirants need to meet the eligibility to get admission in the university. Check below steps for Parul University admission process:
Step 1: Parul University Application Process 2026

The application mode is online. Aspirants need to apply at the official website (https://admissions.paruluniversity.ac.in) of the university. Candidates need to select a course and fill out the details in the application form.
Step 2: Selection rounds

Parul University offers admission to most of the courses based on qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The university conductsPU DATfor admission to BDes and MDes courses. The university also accepts NEET, NATA, JEE Main Paper-2, etc. for specific courses.
Step 3: Final admission

Once the selection rounds are done, the shortlisted candidates are called for document verification to finalise the admission. Aspirants need to payParul University Feesto confirm their seat in the college as per the university's fee structure.

faqs.question: Are admissions open at Parul University?
faqs.answer: Yes, Parul University admission are open. Students who whish to get admission to the courses offered at Parul University can apply now. Parul University application form is available online at university website. Students who fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria can apply online.

faqs.question: How do I get a seat at Parul University?
faqs.answer: Parul University Vadodara offers seats to applicants based on their merit in the qualifying exam or entrance test. The selection for courses such as BDes, MDes, BArch, BPT, BAMS, etc. is entrance-based. For most of the courses, admission is offered based on qualifying exam scores of the aspirants. Selected candidates have to report at the campus for document verification. Aspirants need to pay the course fees to confirm their seat.

faqs.question: How can I get admission at Parul University Ahmedabad?
faqs.answer: Parul University Ahmedabad admission is offered on the basis of merit and entrance. Candidates must secure a minimum aggregate in Class 12 for UG level admissions. Whereas, for PG level admissions, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate in graduation. For several courses, candidates must secure valid scores in accepted entrance exams.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to MBA at Parul University?
faqs.answer: Yes, direct admission for a two-year MBA course is available at Parul University. The university offers MBA course for a duration of two years via its Faculty of Management. Candidates who fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria for this course get direct admission to MBA. To study MBA at Parul University, candidates must be graduated with 50% aggregate in any stream to be eligible for this course. Admission to MBA at Parul University is completely merit-based. Candidates are selected based on their merit in the previous qualifying exam. As per the information available on the official website of Parul University, there is no entrance exam required for the selection of candidates. Eligible candidates are offered direct admission via their scores obtained in the final graduation. For detailed information related to Parul University course admission for MBA,click here.

placement_data.title: Parul University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The highest package recorded during Parul University placement 2025 stood at INR 45 LPA . This package was offered to the student of the Faculty of Hotel Management & Catering Technology batch 2025 by Crowne Plaza. The participating recruiters offered more than 2500 job offers to the batch 2025 of courses like BTech , MBA , BPharma , BDes , and MCA , etc. The students secured over 900 Dream offers and more than 100 Super Dream offers from the participating recruiters. Some of the top recruiters of who visited the Parul University campus for 2025 placements include Amazon, IBM, TCS, Tech Mahindra, PwC, Wipro, Adani Group, Accenture, Godrej, H&M, Radission Blue, Crowne Plaza, etc.

Earlier, the highest and average package offered during Parul University placements 2024 stood at INR 46 LPA and INR 4.50 LPA, respectively. More than 1,300 recruiters visited the campus in 2024 and selected 2,212 students.
Download : Parul University Placements Brochure 2024-25

faqs.question: What is the placement scenario at Parul University?
faqs.answer: Parul University offers decent placements annually for courses like BTech, BBA, MBA, MTech, etc. The highest package secured by the students of the batch 2025 stood at 45 LPA. The participating recruiters offered more than 2500 job offers to the batch 2025. The students secured over 900 Dream offers and more than 100 Super Dream offers from the participating recruiters. Earlier, the highest placements secured by the students of the batch 2024 was INR 46 LPA.

faqs.question: How many offers were made during Parul University placements?
faqs.answer: As per the latest report, the participating recruiters presented more than 2500 job offers to the students of the batch 2025. The students secured over 900 Dream offers and more than 100 Super Dream offers from the recruiters. Some of the top recruiting companies include Amazon, IBM, TCS, Tech Mahindra, PwC, Wipro, Adani Group, Accenture, Godrej, H&M, Radission Blue, Crowne Plaza, etc.

faqs.question: What was the highest package offered during the recent Parul University placements?
faqs.answer: According to the latest report, the Parul University highest package secured by the students of the batch 2025 stood at INR 45 LPA. Check out the highest salary offered between 2024 and 2025 in the table below: Particulars Statistics - 2024 Statistics - 2025 Highest Package INR 46 LPA INR 45 LPA

faqs.question: What is the highest placement at Parul University for BCA?
faqs.answer: There is no course specific data mentioned on the official website of the university related to Parul University BCA placements for the lastest year. However, the general data is available on the official website. During the placements 2022, the overall the highest package went upto INR 30 LPA. Apart from that, the average package was stood at INR 7 LPA. Further, the top recruiters visited the campus during the placement drive of the year 2022 were TCS, HCL, Berger Paints, etc. Find here the latest statistics around the Parul University BCA placements for the year 2023.

faqs.question: Are MBA placements at Parul University any good?
faqs.answer: MBA is one of the most popular courses of Parul University. When it comes to the placements, the University offers decent placements annually. The highest and average package secured by the students of the MBA batch 2025 stood at INR 9 LPA and INR 5 LPA, respectively. More than 200 recruiters visited the campus for MBA placements 2025. The name of the few top recruiters include Accenture, Deloitte, Colgate, Airtel, Godrej, Aditya Birla Group, etc.

faqs.question: What are the salary packages offered during Parul University MBA placements?
faqs.answer: The highest and average package offered during Parul University placements 2025 stood at INR 9 LPA and INR 5 LPA, respectively. Some of the top recruiters of Parul University MBA placements 2025 include Accenture, Deloitte, Colgate, Airtel, Godrej, Aditya Birla Group, Berger Paints, Coca Cola, etc.

faqs.question: What is the MBA tuition fee at Parul University?
faqs.answer: Parul University MBA tuition fee is between INR 1.5 Lacs to INR 8.8 lakh. Stuents have to pay the tutition fee during the admission. Students must note that the mentioned fee detail is taken from the university website and is subject to changed.

faqs.answer: As per the latest report, the participating recruiters placed over 2,212 students of the batch 2024 in various sectors with new-age job roles. The total number of students placed between 2022 and 2024 placement drives at Parul University Ahmedabad are presented below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2022) Placement Statistics (2023) Placement Statistics (2024) Total students placed 1,460 2,100 2,212

description: Parul University Cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to BE/BTech courses. Students can scroll down this page to know the round, year, category and quota-wise cutoff of various accepted exams. A few more exam-related updates are below:

The Parul University cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Parul University BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 8902 and 50317 for the General HS category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Biotechnology. The first round cutoff rank for the same stood a

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the HS quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Biotechnology was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 8902 for the general HS quota.
On the contrary the least competitive specialisations for admission in 2024 were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and with closing cutoff ranks of and

Parul University JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. highlights.description: One of India’s leading institutes is Parul University. It has been consistently recognised by numerous national ranking agencies. As per the NIRF 2025, the institute ranked #41 under Pharmacy category. Parul University excellence in academics, distinguished professors, and well-established infrastructure is the reason for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. All the information around Parul University rankings is covered in the following article:

rankings.highlight: 2nd Best Among Outlook Ranked Colleges In Gujarat In 2024
3rd Best Among India Today Ranked Colleges In Gujarat In 2025
6th Best Among Business Today Ranked Colleges In Gujarat In 2024
2nd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Gujarat In 2025
3rd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Gujarat In 2025

nirf.description:
Parul University has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by NIRF 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'University' category, the institute's ranks have displayed instability in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, Parul University's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
It is to be noted that the institute has demonstrated an increasing trend in the 'Pharmacy' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Parul University climbed 6 ranks to #41 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It has been observed that the institute has shown stability in trend in the 'Innovation' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Parul University's rank is #11, the same as last year's rank in the 'Innovation' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the Parul University latest rankings by other ranking bodies and their categories below:
Read less

outlook.description:
Parul University has received strong ranks by the Outlook under the 'State Private University' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the Outlook 2025.
Find below the latest rankings and category breakdowns from several ranking bodies.

qs_world.description:
Parul University has been ranked well by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Through the years, the QS World University Rankings for Parul University indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the QS World University Rankings.

hostel.description: Parul University has established an in-house residential complex with separate provision for boys and girls with a capacity of accommodating the 7000+ student. The university has on-campus amenities such as gymnasium, swimming pool, open-air theatre, banking service and hospital are also available to the students. Separate hostel blocks for NRIs and International students equipped with air conditioner and other modern facilities are also available. There are Five Messes on campus which serve nutritious breakfast, lunch, high tea and dinner to the hostel residents.
facilities: Hostel: The university has on-campus amenities such as a swimming pool, gymnasium, open-air theatre, banking services, and others
Library: Parul University has various books on General Knowledge and competitive exams, dictionaries, and previous volumes of journals/ magazines
Cafeteria: All the hostels of the university have spacious dining halls.

library.description: Parul University has 10 libraries with more than 24000 books, 15825 online journals/magazines, 1315 print journals/magazines, 30 news dailies, reference section contains encyclopedias, books on general knowledge and competitive exams, dictionaries, previous volumes of journals/magazines and remote access to thousands of libraries through DELNET and also to various reference and plagiarism software. All libraries are linked to the central library “Gyanoday Bhawan” and are fully computerized with barcode system for issue and return of books. More than 20000 students avail book bank facility every year from these libraries at the campus.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Volleyball Court, Hand Ball Court, Table Tennis

cafeteria.description: Parul University serves hygienic, homely and healthy food for all our students and scholars is the top most priority for the management of Parul University. All the hostels of the university have spacious dining halls and messes which serve breakfast, lunch and dinner as per the daily menu with special diet on Sundays. Moreover, there are food courts and college canteens where the students can go for tea, coffee, cold drinks, ice cream, snacks and different varieties of food throughout the day. The university also has Nescafe outlets on campus for students and staff.

reviews.review_heading: The best university India has to offer, both national and international.
reviews.review_text: Good LED TV for PPT, projector, library, easy study material access, and many more things, with great university infrastructure and the best teaching staff. The most important thing is that we are allowed to learn many more things despite the course we have taken.

reviews.review_heading: Knowledgeable faculty and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: I'm a day scholar, and the bus facilities are amazing. My friends live in a hostel, and I've heard about some hostel facilities that are good enough. The campus is very interesting and fun to be in. The bus timings align perfectly with our timetable.

reviews.review_heading: I absolutely loved it. I am satisfied with the infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good, with every necessity provided for the students to use. It has secure Wi-Fi connections. There is a big library with books on so many courses. Hostels of Parul University are good and cozy for living. Free medical support is provided to students of this university in the Parul Hospital. The mess food is of all different kinds and varieties. The food tastes good. We have huge playgrounds and an arena for indoor sports.

reviews.review_heading: Placement is not so good, but the infrastructure is good, and also the exposure it gives.
reviews.review_text: Good Wi-Fi and classrooms. The library is available. The quality of the medicine is available with free checkups. Wi-Fi is available everywhere in the hostel, library, or even food courts. The labs are also new, so nothing is needed. Canteen food is average, and they do provide fest and all.

reviews.review_heading: Average college, not the best.
reviews.review_text: CSE dept: Modern labs with high-speed Wi-Fi, projector classrooms, CSE library, AI/ML labs. Hostels are clean. The hostel has AC/Non-AC rooms, 24/7 Wi-Fi, gym, sports grounds, hospital, average mess food (Guj/North Indian), canteens, ATMs. Room conditions depend on what you pay.

reviews.review_heading: Hostel is bad, placements are mid, campus is really good, hostel food is mid again.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are okay. There are fans but no ACs, so it gets noisy and hot, especially in summers. Overall infrastructure is really good. It has a library, study room, labs, and they are pretty good too. Mess food is mid. They have added digital boards and better video players, and it’s done.

reviews.review_heading: Positive student experience with some areas for improvement.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure for my course/department are excellent, including full-speed unlimited Wi-Fi, classrooms with smart boards, benches with plugs, a huge library, a separate lab building, and a MAC lab. Hostel facilities are good, and the food quality in the mess is also good. Medical facilities are available, as the university has its own hospital. Sports and games options are plentiful, including outdoor and indoor activities, horse riding, swimming, and a gymnasium.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Parul Institute of LawReviewed on 18 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, best extracurricular activities, average study.
reviews.review_text: There are properly facilitated classrooms, Wi-Fi is available, and there is a big library, but it is not air-conditioned. Hostels are good, but the mess is not that good. However, the canteen and cafés are the best. Medical facilities are available. Sports and games facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied with the university.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are in terrible condition. In the name of projector screens, the wall has been covered with a thick layer of lime, and benches are pretty old too. The hostel is in poor condition, and lights are not working properly. The cleaning staff members are not maintaining cleanliness. The issue of food is also very disturbing for students, as the taste is very bad. Medical facilities are average.

reviews.review_heading: Parul University is best for events and campus life, but strict rules which I don't like.
reviews.review_text: Basically, I like the infrastructure. I am a BBA aviation student, so in my department, there's an aviation infrastructure plan class and aviation dummies. The courses are good, my department is well-furnished, and work is going on. It's under construction. More departments are also good for this, like the design department and the B.Tech building. It is a good campus, and the facilities are also very good.

reviews.review_heading: Okay, the college is really nice.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are the best and are in a neat and clean environment. The atmosphere of the college is too good. I don’t know about the mess, but in canteens and all stalls, there is good food. Sports are also a part of our study, and the facilities are also good, and the library is also very comfy.

reviews.review_heading: Parul is a decent private university in 2026.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty good, I would say. The labs are well-equipped, and the classrooms have good long benches with smart boards in every class. There are many libraries on the campus. I personally used the one in the admin block. You will find various books related to your subjects there, along with desktops in the library to be used for academic purposes.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest students take admission in this college in any other courses.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for the course is average. The infrastructure in the hostel is not good because we don't get enough hot water. The food quality is also not good. The mess staff members and reactors also sometimes do not behave properly. It looks like we are surviving for our lives, and the other facilities of the hostel are average.

reviews.review_heading: I like the college for its events and the quality of studies.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are basic, which helps us prepare a foundation, but to grow. We need to seek help from other universities, like government colleges, especially during our major projects. Facilities like a hostel, I don’t have an idea, as I am a day scholar, but sports and games are excellent here. I enjoy indoor sports in my free time, and the canteen is also good on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and social life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is awesome, and the facilities that we have are very good. Wi-Fi is so good, and classrooms are good and hygienic. The library is so great, and the reading area is too spacious, and we see the hostel facilities are awesome.

reviews_list.batch_info: BHMS - Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college if you are interested in practicing homeopathy.

review_content.Placements: Being a medical college, there are no placements. There are various internship programs provided by the university. After passing out, you may easily get jobs in any hospital as per your practice. You can become RMO and MO in any hospital or run your own clinics.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. The campus has Wi-Fi. It has all labs like an anatomy lab, physiology lab, pathology lab, biochemistry lab, FMT lab, etc.. A good library is provided with all types of books. The hostel is good and very clean. The food provided in the mess is not bad. They provide non-vegetarian food items on Sunday and Friday.

reviews_list.batch_info: BHMS - Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure, faculty, and facility.

review_content.Placements: MHF HMC Hospital has very good faculties for medical students. A NEET score above 250 gets admission in this college. The highest and lowest package in this course is between 40000 and above 100000. The top role offered in this course is as a physician.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities and infrastructure available for this course or department, like Wi-Fi, labs, and libraries, are available; the quality of hostel rooms is also very good. And the food available in the mess and canteen is tasty. Medical facilities and sports and games are also available.

individual_reviews.course: BHMS - Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Everything about college is good, except mess. The food they provide is not good and hygienic.

content.Placements: This is one of the best homeopathic medical colleges in Maharashtra. Total 100 students take admission in this course every year. Placements and internships are good in this college. College provide various career opportunities for students in best way.
content.Infrastructure: There is big spacious and beautiful campus with many trees and flowers There is a botanical garden on college campus. They also provide other facilities like library, Wi-Fi, mess, canteen, etc. They have both girls and boys hostel in the campus at minimum distance from college.

individual_reviews.course: BHMS - Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college if you are interested in practicing homeopathy.

content.Placements: Being a medical college, there are no placements. There are various internship programs provided by the university. After passing out, you may easily get jobs in any hospital as per your practice. You can become RMO and MO in any hospital or run your own clinics.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. The campus has Wi-Fi. It has all labs like an anatomy lab, physiology lab, pathology lab, biochemistry lab, FMT lab, etc.. A good library is provided with all types of books. The hostel is good and very clean. The food provided in the mess is not bad. They provide non-vegetarian food items on Sunday and Friday.

individual_reviews.course: BHMS - Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure, faculty, and facility.

content.Placements: MHF HMC Hospital has very good faculties for medical students. A NEET score above 250 gets admission in this college. The highest and lowest package in this course is between 40000 and above 100000. The top role offered in this course is as a physician.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities and infrastructure available for this course or department, like Wi-Fi, labs, and libraries, are available; the quality of hostel rooms is also very good. And the food available in the mess and canteen is tasty. Medical facilities and sports and games are also available.

review_summary.college_name: Indukaka Ipcowala College of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Companies that offered placements in our course were Zydus, etc. Many students went abroad. The top role offered was drug inspector. The lowest salary offered was Rs.10,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: The canteen was of low quality. Hostels were very good. Our college did not provide Wi-Fi. Labs had all the required facilities. Medical facilities were available. Our campus was big.
content.Faculty: Teachers in our course were always helpful, friendly, and well qualified with M. Pharma. The difficulty level of exams was medium. The teaching quality of some teachers was good. The pass percentage is 60-70%. Exams did not make students ready for industries.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The college is good but the faculty is the worst.

content.Placements: 50 students take admission in paramedical course. The tutor charges 80500 INR per year as fees. Final year students have 6-month internship in all the departments. They provide knowledge and skills to the students.
content.Infrastructure: There are no Wi-Fi, canteen and medical facilities available on campus. Sports and games are conducted in the college. There is no food served in the college. The mess facilities are given only to the hostel students. They charge 2000 per month for hostel. There is no sports ground and the overall infra is not good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of placements, but the infrastructure and facilities are good.

content.Placements: Absolutely dissatisfied because of placements. No company came for recruiting. The students don't get a chance for an internship. The faculty members guide you for the project work, internship etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities in our hostel are good. It has good rooms, water supply, and air-ventilation in rooms. Food quality in the mess is average. They provide good food on occasions or festivals. The campus location is great.
content.Faculty: The teachers in our college are very helpful. They also provide assistance to weak students. Teachers are experienced and knowledgeable. Teaching quality was sometimes good and sometimes average. The course was perfect, but due to lack of industrial training, students face issues during employment.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a great college with helping teachers.

content.Placements: If students are good at studies, they can get a good salary package. Our college is providing good placements according to students calibre. Even our faculty members are trying to get proper salary packages for their students.
content.Infrastructure: In hostels, facilities provided are good. Rooms are cleaned daily, and in the mess the food served in hygienic and healthy. Every month feast is held in the mess. Good security is also provided in the hostels. Students need not be afraid of anything.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Indukaka Ipcowala College of Pharmacy

content.Placements: There is no such thing as placement in this college. Students having first-class results are too roaming for getting a job. At the time of admission, they promised for providing placements but that turned out to be a fake promise. They have interest only in fees, that's it.
content.Infrastructure: In the case of infrastructure, colleges and hostels have very good construction. But if we talk about its maintenance, I would rate it zero. They don't even clean corners properly, and there are no sufficient fans, lights, or ACs. Even some of the fans and lights they have do not work properly. It makes noise too much. They provide very bad benches and they don't buy new benches, but they are not even repairing old ones. Students have to sit on broken benches sometime. I am giving 2 stars only for the design of the building.

admission_overview.college_name: Lotus Business School Admission 2025: Application Process, Eligibility, Courses & Fee

paragraphs: Lotus Business School admission 2025 is released on the college's official website. The college offers MBA and PGDM courses in various specialisations. AtLotus Business Schoolthe mode of application is online. To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to fill out the eligibility criteria i.e., pass a graduation degree in any stream with 50% aggregate from a recognised university/institute. Additionally, for admission to MBA and PGDM courses, the college accepts various entrance exams such as CAT, MAT, XAT, ATMA and many others. All the information related to the Lotus Business School admission process 2025 along with course eligibility, and selection criteria are available in the following segments:

Lotus Business School course admissionis entrance-based. Candidates are required to clear their eligibility and provide valid entrance exam scores to be considered for admission into the course. Prospective students must have completed graduation from a recognised university along with providing the entrance test score. Interested students can check out the table below to know about the eligibility and selection criteria for theLotus Business School course:
Course Name
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
UG degree with a minimum 50% aggregate
UG degree with a minimum 50% aggregate
CAT/XAT/CMAT/MAT/ATMA/MHT CET
Download:Lotus Business School Broucher 2025

The admission process for Lotus Business School involves several steps, such as online registration, selection criteria, and admission confirmation. The entire process commences online. Aspirants can follow the steps explained below to complete theLotus Business Schooladmission process:
Step 1: Lotus Business School Application Process
Students can visit the official website of the college and fill out the application to apply for PGDM and MBA programmes.
Step 2:Lotus Business School Selection Rounds

Admissions at Lotus Business School are entrance-based. Candidates are shortlisted based on their application and eligibility criteria as per the course requirement. Further, for the final selection, candidates are evaluated as per their scores in one of the entrance exams such as CAT/XAT/CMAT/MAT/ATMA/CET.
Step 3: Lotus Business School Final Admission
Candidates who pass all the selection rounds are notified through mail or on its website. The selected candidates must pay a certain amount ofLotus Business School feeto lock their seats.

overview_faqs.question: Is Shivdan Singh Institute of Technology and Management a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Shivdan Singh Institute of Technology and Management, located in Aligarh, Uttar Pradesh, is a renowned educational institution and was established in the year 1997. The institute offers a wide range of Degree and Diploma programmes at UG, PG and After 10th levels. Shivdan Singh Institute of Technology and Management offers courses within the range of INR 22.3 K - INR 2.8 Lakh of total tuition fees. These courses are offered to students in full time mode across various fields, including IT & Software, Medicine & Health Sciences, Engineering and Business & Management Studies. The institute has received the overall Shiksha rating of 4.2 out of 5. Therefore, we can conclude that Shivdan Singh Institute of Technology and Management is a decent college.
